title: Add test-file.txt placeholder
what_changed: A new top-level file `test-file.txt` was added containing a single timestamped placeholder line.
risk_assessment: Risk is very low because the change only adds a standalone text file and does not modify application code or configuration. The main concern is whether this file is intentional or leftover test content.
